care.summary: Vibrant, easy-to-grow annual beloved for bold blooms; thrives in heat and full sun with minimal fuss.
care.water: Moderate; water at base, allow soil to dry slightly between sessions
care.soil: Well-draining, moderately fertile; slightly acidic to neutral (pH 5.5-7.0)
care.humidity: Low to moderate; good air circulation prevents fungal issues
care.fertilizer: Balanced fertilizer every 4 weeks; avoid excess nitrogen to encourage blooms over foliage
common_issues: Powdery mildew in humid or crowded conditions
Aphids and spider mites in dry weather
Root rot from overwatering or poor drainage
tips: Deadhead spent blooms regularly to extend flowering season
Direct sow seeds after last frost for best results
Space plants 30-45 cm apart for airflow and mildew prevention
Excellent for attracting butterflies and bees
Harvest cut flowers early morning when blooms are half-open for longest vase life
